hero.title: Ergo Platform
hero.subtitle: A resilient blockchain platform for contractual money
hero.description: A resilient blockchain platform for contractual money. Ergo builds advanced cryptographic features and radically new DeFi functionality on the rock-solid foundations laid by a decade of blockchain theory and development.
hero.message1: Decentralized Money for a Free Society
hero.message2: The globally-neutral settlement layer for programmable money.
hero.message3: The open-source home of digital freedom
hero.message4: Join the movement for decentralized, open-source money

footer.description: Ergo is a resilient blockchain platform for contractual money. Built on solid foundations with advanced cryptographic features.

seo.defaultTitle: Ergo Platform - Resilient Blockchain for Contractual Money
seo.defaultDescription: Ergo builds advanced cryptographic features and radically new DeFi functionality on the rock-solid foundations laid by a decade of blockchain theory and development.
seo.keywords: blockchain, cryptocurrency, DeFi, smart contracts, Ergo, UTXO, proof of work

errors.pageNotFoundDescription: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

start.title: Start Your Ergo Journey
start.subtitle: Choose your path into the Ergo ecosystem
start.description: Whether you're new to crypto, want to learn more, build applications, mine, or invest - we have a personalized path for you.

testnet.title: Try Test Coins
testnet.description: Get free testnet ERG to practice

technology.title: Ergo Technology
technology.subtitle: Advanced blockchain technology for the future of finance
technology.description: Explore Ergo's innovative technical features that make it the most advanced blockchain platform for building secure, scalable, and sustainable applications.

eutxo.title: eUTXO Model
eutxo.description: Extended UTXO model that enables parallel smart contract execution and composable DeFi applications. Eliminates reentrancy attacks while maintaining Bitcoin's proven security model.

parallel.title: Parallel Execution
parallel.description: Smart contracts run independently without global state conflicts.

composability.title: Composability
composability.description: Build complex DeFi applications from simple, reusable components.

ergoscript.title: ErgoScript
ergoscript.description: Powerful smart contract language designed for security and flexibility. Features built-in Sigma protocols for zero-knowledge proofs and formal verification support for bulletproof contracts.

verification.title: Formal Verification
verification.description: Mathematically prove your smart contracts are secure and bug-free.

privacy.title: Built-in Privacy
privacy.description: Native zero-knowledge proofs and ring signatures for confidential transactions.

safety.title: Safe by Design
safety.description: Prevents common vulnerabilities like reentrancy attacks and unexpected behaviors.

autolykos.title: Autolykos PoW
autolykos.description: Energy-efficient, ASIC-resistant mining algorithm that democratizes network participation. Designed for GPU mining to keep the network decentralized and accessible to everyone.

efficient.title: Energy Efficient
efficient.description: Memory-hard algorithm reduces power consumption compared to traditional PoW.

mining.title: Solo Mining Friendly
mining.description: Low barrier to entry enables individual miners to participate profitably.

resistant.title: ASIC Resistant
resistant.description: Optimized for consumer GPUs to prevent mining centralization.

storage.title: Storage Rent
storage.description: Revolutionary economic model that prevents blockchain bloat. Inactive coins pay minimal rent after 4 years, ensuring sustainable blockchain size and permanent miner rewards.

sustainable.title: Sustainable Blockchain
sustainable.description: Automatic cleanup of unused data keeps the blockchain lean and efficient.

security.title: Perpetual Security
security.description: Miners receive rewards forever, ensuring long-term network security.

cleanup.title: Automatic Cleanup
cleanup.description: Unused UTXOs are recycled, preventing blockchain bloat and spam.

use.title: Use Cases
use.subtitle: Real-world applications powered by Ergo
use.description: Discover how Ergo's advanced technology enables innovative solutions across finance, privacy, gaming, and more.

stablecoins.title: Algorithmic Stablecoins
stablecoins.subtitle: Stable value storage without centralized control
stablecoins.description: Over-collateralized stablecoins with innovative AgeUSD protocol.

privacy.title: Privacy & Confidentiality
privacy.subtitle: Financial privacy in an increasingly surveilled world
privacy.description: Non-custodial mixers, stealth addresses, zero-knowledge proofs for complete privacy.

bridges.title: Cross-Chain Bridges
bridges.subtitle: Secure, trustless value transfer between blockchains
bridges.description: Decentralized bridges with multi-signature security, no central custody.

daos.title: DAOs & Alternative Economies
daos.subtitle: Community governance and alternative economic systems
daos.description: Composable DAO infrastructure: treasury, voting, profit-sharing.

nfts.title: NFTs & Digital Assets
nfts.subtitle: True digital ownership, dynamic properties
nfts.description: On-chain metadata, protocol royalties, programmable NFTs.

oracles.title: Oracles & Data Feeds
oracles.subtitle: Bringing real-world data on-chain
oracles.description: Decentralized oracle pools provide external data for DeFi & prediction markets.

identity.title: Identity & Reputation
identity.subtitle: Self-sovereign identity & Web3 reputation
identity.description: Decentralized identifiers (DID), Sybil resistance, reputation systems.

gaming.title: Gaming & Metaverse
gaming.subtitle: Next-gen gaming assets & digital worlds
gaming.description: Programmable gaming tokens, NFT-powered economies, metaverse infrastructure.

learn.title: Learn Ergo
learn.subtitle: Master the future of blockchain technology
learn.description: From beginner-friendly tutorials to advanced research papers.

ergoscript.title: ErgoScript Tutorial Series
ergoscript.description: Master ErgoScript: Your path to building secure and powerful smart contracts on Ergo, step by step.

faq.title: Comprehensive FAQ
faq.description: Everything you need to know about Ergo blockchain, technology, and ecosystem in one place.

research.title: Research Papers
research.description: Deep dive into the academic research and technical papers behind Ergo's innovations.
